channel.title: OpenTelemetry on See Hiong's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in OpenTelemetry on See Hiong's Blog

item.title: Self-Hosting SigNoz Observability with LiteLLM
item.description: A practical homelab setup for self-hosting SigNoz and LiteLLM on Kubernetes, with OpenTelemetry-based tracing and metrics for local AI workloads like PDFusion.
